tests.name: Detects missing frontmatter (CRITICAL)
tests.description: Should detect when SKILL.md is missing YAML frontmatter

tests.name: Detects CSO violation - workflow in description (CRITICAL)
tests.description: Should detect when description contains workflow steps instead of triggering conditions
setup:
echo '---
name: test-skill
description: Use when testing - runs validation then commits
---
# Test' > /tmp/test-skill-review-2/test-skill/SKILL.md

tests.name: Detects invalid Graphviz syntax (CRITICAL)
tests.description: Should detect when flowchart has invalid dot syntax
setup:
echo '---
name: test-skill
description: Use when testing
---
# Test

```dot
digraph {
  invalid syntax here
```' > /tmp/test-skill-review-3/test-skill/SKILL.md

tests.name: Detects naming convention violation (WARNING)
tests.description: Should detect when skill name doesn't follow pattern (uses underscore instead of hyphen)
setup:
echo '---
name: test_skill
description: Use when testing
---
# Test' > /tmp/test-skill-review-4/test_skill/SKILL.md

tests.name: Detects broken cross-reference (WARNING)
tests.description: Should detect when skill references non-existent skill
setup:
echo '---
name: test-skill
description: Use when testing
---
# Test

## Skill Chaining

**Chains to non-existent-skill**' > /tmp/test-skill-review-5/test-skill/SKILL.md

tests.name: Detects missing Success Criteria for artifact-producing skill (NOTE)
tests.description: Should recommend Success Criteria section for skills that produce artifacts
setup:
echo '---
name: git-commit-test
description: Use when committing
---
# Test

No Success Criteria section' > /tmp/test-skill-review-6/git-commit-test/SKILL.md

tests.name: Accepts valid skill with all requirements
tests.description: Should approve skill that meets all structural requirements
setup:
cat > /tmp/test-skill-review-7/test-skill/SKILL.md << 'EOF'
---
name: test-skill
description: Use when testing skills
---

# Test Skill

## Workflow

Test workflow

## Skill Chaining

**Invoked by:** git-commit

## Success Criteria

- ✅ Tests pass

## Common Pitfalls

| Mistake | Why It's Wrong | Fix |
|---------|----------------|-----|
| Example | Reason | Solution |
EOF

tests.name: Deep analysis mode - validates all cross-references
tests.description: In deep analysis mode, should verify all referenced skills exist and cross-references are bidirectional
setup:
echo '---
name: skill-a
description: Use when A
---
# A

## Skill Chaining

**Chains to skill-b**' > /tmp/test-skill-review-8/skill-a/SKILL.md

echo '---
name: skill-b
description: Use when B
---
# B

## Skill Chaining

**Invoked by skill-a**' > /tmp/test-skill-review-8/skill-b/SKILL.md
